seasonTagline: You shine with the dramatic clarity and depth of a moonlit night, captivating in your cool, striking presence.
skinDescription: Your skin has a cool, porcelain undertone with a medium depth, displaying a subtle rosiness.
hairDescription: Your hair is a deep, rich black with a cool, neutral tone.
eyeDescription: Your eyes are a dark, clear brown, lacking warmth and contributing to your overall cool and high-contrast appearance.
seasonStory: You possess the striking beauty of Deep Winter, characterized by your deep coloring, high contrast, and cool undertones. Your natural features command attention, and you are perfectly complemented by clear, deep, and cool colors that mirror your own intensity.

bestColors.name: Pure Black
bestColors.reason: Your hair is naturally this deep, rich black, making it a foundational neutral that highlights your features.

bestColors.name: True White
bestColors.reason: The stark contrast of pure white against your deep coloring creates a dramatic and sharp look.

bestColors.name: Royal Blue
bestColors.reason: A vibrant and clear blue that harmonizes beautifully with your cool undertones and deep features.

bestColors.name: Cool Red
bestColors.reason: This intense, blue-based red is striking and complements your high contrast and cool palette.

bestColors.name: Emerald Green
bestColors.reason: A clear, deep green that resonates with your cool and vivid coloring.

bestColors.name: Icy Pink
bestColors.reason: A bright, cool pink that adds a touch of delicate vibrancy without compromising your cool tones.

bestColors.name: Deep Navy
bestColors.reason: A sophisticated and dark blue that offers a strong alternative to black.

bestColors.name: Burgundy (Cool Tone)
bestColors.reason: A rich, deep, and cool-toned red that adds depth and elegance.

bestColors.name: Charcoal Grey
bestColors.reason: A softer alternative to black, this deep grey maintains your high contrast and cool palette.

bestColors.name: Deep Emerald
bestColors.reason: A richer, darker version of emerald green that enhances your deep coloring.

bestColors.name: Cool Plum
bestColors.reason: A deep, enigmatic purple that aligns perfectly with your cool and striking features.

bestColors.name: Fuchsia
bestColors.reason: A bold and bright cool-toned pink that adds a vibrant pop of color.

avoidColors.name: Warm Yellow
avoidColors.reason: Warm yellows clash with your cool undertones and can make your skin appear sallow.

avoidColors.name: Burnt Orange
avoidColors.reason: This warm, earthy tone is too muted and warm for your clear, cool coloring.

avoidColors.name: Olive Green
avoidColors.reason: Muted, warm greens do not harmonize with your clear, cool complexion.

foundation.tip: Opt for cool-toned foundations with a neutral or pink base to match your skin's natural rosiness and avoid any yellow or golden undertones.

celebrities.name: Zoe Saldana
celebrities.reason: She has a similar deep skin tone, dark hair, and striking cool features that align with Deep Winter.

celebrities.name: Penélope Cruz
celebrities.reason: Her high contrast, dark hair, and cool undertones are characteristic of a Deep Winter.

celebrities.name: Connie Britton
celebrities.reason: She exhibits the deep coloring, high contrast, and cool clarity typical of the Deep Winter season.

celebrities.name: Shakira
celebrities.reason: Her naturally dark hair, deep eyes, and tendency to look best in cool, vibrant colors align with Deep Winter characteristics.
